title: Bitcoin treasury firms add 603 BTC as Strategy pauses buying
summary: Smaller Bitcoin treasury companies bought about $46 million worth of Bitcoin below $80,000 last week as the largest corporate holder paused its weekly buys.

title: Binance eyes Philippines return through SEC sandbox partnership
summary: Binance remains blocked in the Philippines after a 2024 NTC directive tied to SEC concerns over licensing and registration.

title: Powell Will Vote With His Mind and Heart, Daco Says
summary: Gregory Daco, EY-Parthenon chief economist, says he thinks former Federal Reserve Chair Jerome Powell will not be afraid to dissent as a member of the board of governors. Daco speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Rise Toward Record as Iran Peace Hopes Hold: Markets Wrap
summary: Wall Street kicked off the holiday-shortened week with stocks joining bonds higher as hopes for a peace deal between the US and Iran overshadowed military strikes in the Persian Gulf.

title: Strategy (MSTR) Retires $1.5 Billion in Convertible Debt at a Discount, Bitcoin Holdings Hit 843,738 BTC
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

Strategy (MSTR) Retires $1.5 Billion in Convertible Debt at a Discount, Bitcoin Holdings Hit 843,738 BTC
Strategy retired $1.5 billion in convertible debt at an 8% discount, bringing its holdings to 843,738 BTC as it actively rebalances its capital structure.

title: The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
summary:
Bitcoin Magazine

The History and Future of Physical Bitcoin
Bitcoin is invisible code — but for over a decade, creators have turned it into coins, cards, and USBs you can touch. Here’s how close we’ve gotten to real, cash-like BTC.

title: Lucky Trader Rides $341 World Cup Meme Coin Buy to 14,000% Gains
summary: The trader still has over $100,000 worth of unrealized gains in the World Cup token, ahead of the start of the tournament next month.

title: Morning Minute: Trump Hints That Iran Deal May Be Close, Markets Rebound
summary: Markets bounced back on Trump's “largely negotiated” U.S.-Iran deal, but further airstrikes underscore the fragile geopolitical position.

title: Hong Kong advances virtual asset advisory and management rulemaking
summary: Hong Kong moves to license crypto advisers and managers under anti-money laundering rules, with a 2026 legislative target.

title: Liquid launches Co-Invest app, bringing AI-powered live trade execution into ChatGPT and Claude
summary: Co-Invest supports crypto, equities, FX, Polymarket positions and pre-IPO secondaries across over 500 markets, according to Liquid.

title: BP removes chair Albert Manifold over ‘serious concerns’ about his conduct
summary: Hands-on approach was viewed as excessive by several colleagues at oil major

title: Apple has an innovation gap. Will its new CEO fill it?
summary: As John Ternus prepares to take charge, the tech titan that once urged consumers to ‘think different’ may itself be ripe for disruption
